description_long: This is a sleek, modern chest of drawers with a deep black finish and three spacious drawers stacked vertically. Each drawer features a prominent, circular gold handle with a black center, adding a touch of elegance and contrast to the otherwise minimalist design. The chest has gently rounded edges and corners, giving it a refined and contemporary appearance. The legs are subtly curved, providing stability while maintaining a light, airy feel. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. There are no visible decorative carvings or embellishments beyond the striking handles.
description: A modern black chest of drawers with three gold-accented handles and a smooth, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with gold and black circular handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a smooth, unadorned black surface and the chest's curved edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, featureless black panel and rounded corners.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with a smooth black surface and curved edge.
